changeSet.author: mini-erp
changeSet.sql: UPDATE purchase_order_lines l SET variant_id = (SELECT v.id FROM product_variants v WHERE v.product_id = l.product_id ORDER BY v.is_default DESC, v.sku ASC LIMIT 1) WHERE l.variant_id IS NULL AND l.product_id IS NOT NULL;

changeSet.author: mini-erp
changeSet.sql: UPDATE purchase_invoice_lines l SET variant_id = (SELECT v.id FROM product_variants v WHERE v.product_id = l.product_id ORDER BY v.is_default DESC, v.sku ASC LIMIT 1) WHERE l.variant_id IS NULL AND l.product_id IS NOT NULL;

changeSet.author: mini-erp
changeSet.sql: UPDATE goods_receipt_lines l SET variant_id = (SELECT v.id FROM product_variants v WHERE v.product_id = l.product_id ORDER BY v.is_default DESC, v.sku ASC LIMIT 1) WHERE l.variant_id IS NULL AND l.product_id IS NOT NULL;

changeSet.author: mini-erp
changeSet.sql: UPDATE purchase_credit_note_lines l SET variant_id = (SELECT v.id FROM product_variants v WHERE v.product_id = l.product_id ORDER BY v.is_default DESC, v.sku ASC LIMIT 1) WHERE l.variant_id IS NULL AND l.product_id IS NOT NULL;
